title: cytisus decumbens subsp. decumbens
intro: Cytisus decumbens subsp. decumbens is a subspecies of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. Also known as prostrate broom, it is a low-growing, spreading shrub native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, respiratory issues, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Cytisus decumbens subsp. decumbens include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall health and well-being.
